ranking_top20.rationale: Street-level address, shop name with 店/号, recognizable district. Already wired → open_in_maps.
→/入口/出口/左转. Action: integrate with location.
Cellphone (1[3-9]xxxxxxxxx), landline (xxx-xxxxxxxx), or contact keyword. Action: open dialer.
6+6 latin words in a row (not acronyms). Action: translate.
医院/学校/政府/银行. Action: open maps + hours.
请勿/禁止/警告/危险. Action: explain warning text.
促销/打折/满减/秒杀/亏本/清仓/甩卖. Action: copy_to_clipboard for sharing.
Explicit currency (￥/元/块/$). Action: copy price for shopping list.
菜品/火锅/烧烤/餐厅 or 套餐/招牌菜. Action: translate menu.
广告/策划/设计/VI/LOGO. Action: copy agency contact.
年/月/日/周N/节假日. Action: add_to_calendar.
营业时间/AM/PM/HH:MM-HH:MM. Action: copy hours.
二手房/出租/转让/楼盘. Action: copy listing details.
批发/零售/代购/微商 e-commerce. Action: copy product details.
恭喜/春节/中秋/祝福/开业大吉. Action: copy greeting.
CRH/动车/高铁/航班/公交车/地铁. Action: lookup train/flight route.
Explicit web URL or .com/.cn/.net mention. Action: open_browser.
招聘/诚聘/招工/兼职. Action: copy job posting.
微信/QQ contact or QR. Action: open_wechat (privacy-aware).
停车场/P车牌/停车费. Action: open maps to parking.
